title: dasyglossum fractum
intro: Dasyglossum fractum, also known as the 'broken-wood fern', is a rare and endangered species of plant native to the tropical rainforests of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Dasyglossum fractum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Dasyglossum fractum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder in capsules or supplements.
